properties.name: ai.provider
properties.description: AI provider to use: gemini or ollama.

properties.name: ollama.enabled
properties.description: Whether Ollama fallback is enabled when Gemini quota is exhausted.

properties.name: ollama.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for local Ollama server.

properties.name: ollama.model
properties.description: Ollama model name used for local generation.

properties.name: ai.ollama.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for local Ollama server

properties.name: ai.ollama.model
properties.description: Ollama model tag to use (e.g. llama3.2:latest)
